generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are only contributing 1.5% of their GDP to defense, while we're carrying the burden with 3.5%? This imbalance puts our national security at risk. Experts warn that without fair burden-sharing, our deterrence weakens. It's time to demand accountability and ensure our alliances truly protect us. #NationalSecurity #NATO #AllianceCommitment
